description_te: రైతులకు subsidized farm machinery. Custom Hiring Centers (CHC) ద్వారా tractors, harvesters అద్దెకు. ₹50/hour subsidy.
description_en: Subsidized farm machinery for farmers through Custom Hiring Centers (CHC). Tractors, harvesters on rent with ₹50/hour subsidy.

eligibility_criteria.automatic: No eligibility restrictions — any farmer can use

benefit_amount: ₹50/hour subsidy on machinery rental (effective rate: ₹300-500/hour vs market ₹800-1000/hour)
application_process_te:
1. Nearest Custom Hiring Centre (CHC) కి call/visit
2. Required machinery book
3. Scheduled date కి machinery comes to field
4. Subsidized rate pay
5. RBK (Rythu Bharosa Kendra) ద్వారా కూడా book చేయవచ్చు
